households.source: ONS, Families and households in the UK, 2023 bulletin (May 2024)

population.source: ONS, Population estimates for the UK, mid-2023 (October 2024)

annual_demand_twh.description: UK electricity final consumption by end users (TWh/year), used for the per-MWh-delivered framing. Total demand including losses was 320.2 TWh in 2025; the lower final-consumption figure is used so the per-MWh framing is not overstated by network losses.
annual_demand_twh.source: DESNZ Energy Trends, March 2026 statistical release (2025 annual data, section 5 / table 5.2)

nurse_salary_gbp.description: NHS Band 5 nurse annual salary, top of band (Agenda for Change, England, 2025-26). Top of band is used so nurse-equivalent counts are conservative.
nurse_salary_gbp.source: NHS Employers, Agenda for Change pay scales 2025/26

ghost_hospital_gbp.description: Indicative cost of building a new, average mid-sized hospital, per NAO reporting on the New Hospital Programme.
ghost_hospital_gbp.source: National Audit Office, Progress with the New Hospital Programme (July 2023)

deflator.source: ONS, CPIH Index 00 All Items 2015=100, annual averages (series L522)

bill.source: DESNZ, Digest of UK Energy Statistics (DUKES) 1.3, Sales of electricity and gas by sector
